summary: Alphabet has several large AI infrastructure-related treasury movements inside the same window as fresh public AI chip coverage.
baseline_comparison: Observed CHF 16,500,000 in AI infrastructure-linked payments versus CHF 15,000,000 expected monthly volume.
recommended_action: Add to RM call brief and ask whether treasury, FX, operating-account, or financing needs are changing with the AI infrastructure buildout.

summary: GameStop has treasury movements to digital-asset and collateral counterparties after a baseline that expected retail operating flows.
baseline_comparison: Digital-asset counterparties are outside the prior retail treasury activity description.
recommended_action: Route to KYC refresh and document whether crypto treasury activity changes the risk profile or service opportunity.

summary: Coinbase has synthetic Australia-linked counterparties after the coinbase.au domain signal.
baseline_comparison: Australia was not in expected counterparty regions for the activity baseline.
recommended_action: Ask RM to confirm whether Australia is active launch activity, pre-launch planning, or defensive registration.

summary: Garantex has post-sanctions synthetic Russia/VASP-linked payments requiring enhanced review.
baseline_comparison: Russia-linked counterparties and VASP cluster activity exceed the expected Estonia-only activity baseline.
recommended_action: Escalate to compliance for sanctions and AML review. Treat as a review trigger, not a final determination.

summary: BAT has a synthetic North Korea exposure review placeholder following public OFAC settlement evidence.
baseline_comparison: North Korea is outside the expected regions and should be treated as a sanctions-review scenario.
recommended_action: Escalate to compliance and document that this is synthetic internal context for the demo.

summary: Polymarket has Spain-linked payments after public reporting of market-access blocking and gambling-license review.
baseline_comparison: Spain is outside the expected counterparty regions in the activity baseline.
recommended_action: Ask RM to confirm whether Spanish exposure has been halted, remediated, or requires KYC update.

summary: Robinhood has post-acquisition flows to Bitstamp entities that align with the public ownership/control alert.
baseline_comparison: Bitstamp entity flows were not part of the pre-acquisition activity profile.
recommended_action: Request updated corporate structure and operating-account map for the newly acquired entities.
